External Penetration Testing

We test your internet-facing systems the way an attacker would see them—from the outside.

What It Covers

  • Websites and web applications
  • Email servers and mail gateways
  • VPNs and remote access solutions
  • DNS infrastructure
  • Cloud services (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
  • Open ports and services

Our Approach

We start with reconnaissance—gathering information just like a real attacker would. Then we probe for vulnerabilities, misconfigurations, and weak points. Every finding is verified manually; we don't just run automated scans and call it done.

Deliverables

  • Detailed findings report with screenshots and proof of concept
  • Risk-rated vulnerabilities (Critical, High, Medium, Low)
  • Remediation recommendations for each finding
  • Executive summary for leadership
  • Live debrief call to walk through results

Typical Timeline

Most external tests complete within 1-2 weeks, depending on scope. We'll give you a timeline estimate before we start.

What You'll Need

  • Scope definition (what systems are in-scope)
  • Access credentials (if applicable)
  • Any existing documentation
Request a Quote
